aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as structured schema markup and localized content. However, it lacks depth in content optimization, user engagement features, and review generation.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and enhance local SEO.
Optimize meta titles and descriptions with targeted keywords for better search visibility.
Enhance content with location-specific service pages and FAQs to address user queries.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has localized service information for Phoenix and surrounding areas.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a good local presence with multiple location references. However, the lack of Google Business Profile (GBP) and customer reviews significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) found.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are consistent on the website but lack external citations on major directories and local listings.
action_items: Create and verify NAP citations on Google, Yelp, Bing, and other relevant local directories.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and social media profiles.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed business hours and service area.
No FAQPage or QAPage schema for addressing common customer queries.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services with local intent and seeking trusted providers.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing existing content for local SEO.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing informative content, such as blog posts on HVAC maintenance and energy efficiency.

business_name: Four Seasons Home Services - Phoenix, AZ
page_title: Heating Service, AC Service, Plumber & Heating Repair | Cave Creek, AZ, Deer Valley, AZ, Phoenix, AZ, Paradise Valley, AZ, Sun City, AZ & New River, AZ | Four Seasons Home Services
